CustomField.description: Prioritize Legal requests based on the given parameters
CustomField.formula: IF( and( text(Status__c) <> 'Completed', text(Status__c) <> 'Cancelled', Opportunity__r.IsClosed = false, RecordType.Name = 'Legal Services' ), IF( OR( Opportunity_ARR__c >= 100000, Opportunity_Close_Date__c - 7 <= TODAY(), text(Priority__c) = 'P1 (High Urgency)', DAY(today()) > 21, and( Days_in_Current_Status__c >= 5, OR( text(Status__c) = 'Submitted', text(Status__c) = 'Resubmitted' ) ) ), "1 - Critical", IF( OR( Opportunity_ARR__c >= 70000, Opportunity_Close_Date__c - 14 <= TODAY(), text(Priority__c) = 'P2 (Risk Account/Prospect)', and( Days_in_Current_Status__c = 4, OR( text(Status__c) = 'Submitted', text(Status__c) = 'Resubmitted' ) ) ), "2 - High", IF( OR( Opportunity_ARR__c >= 25000, Opportunity_Close_Date__c - 30 <= TODAY(), text(Priority__c) = 'P3 (When You Have Time)', and( Days_in_Current_Status__c = 3, OR( text(Status__c) = 'Submitted', text(Status__c) = 'Resubmitted' ) ) ), "3 - Medium", IF( AND( Days_in_Current_Status__c < 3, OR( text(Status__c) = 'Submitted', text(Status__c) = 'Resubmitted' ) ), "4 - Low", "" ) ) ) ), "" )
CustomField.label: Legal Request Prioritization
